# FocusGram

## Project info

- Project name: FocusGram
- Repository: https://github.com/hbx1-bx1/FocusGram
- Latest release: https://github.com/hbx1-bx1/FocusGram/releases/latest

## Description

FocusGram is a distraction-free Instagram Direct Messages wrapper for Desktop and Android MVP.

## Main purpose

Use Instagram Direct Messages without Reels, Explore, Stories, posts, profiles, and distracting media.

## Platforms

- macOS
- Windows
- Linux
- Android MVP

## Keywords

- Instagram Direct Messages wrapper
- Instagram DM only app
- distraction-free Instagram
- block Instagram Reels
- block Instagram Explore
- Instagram productivity app
- Focus app for Instagram
- minimal Instagram client

## Disclaimer

FocusGram is not affiliated with Instagram, Meta, Facebook, or WhatsApp.
